raw_consumer_statement: Citi failed to declined a charge on my credit card in which I disputed less than 24 hours from the charge date/time and while it's still in pending status, Citi fail to handle this issue as a result of relaying on automated systems and/or AI rather than a human review of the disputed charge when first reported, and now Citi reporting the charge to credit reporting services as a late and/or unpaid payments, and I keep getting alert from XXXX that there is late unpaid payment reported by Citi.
